calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Agent Under Power Of Attorney For Order To Establish Special Needs Trust; And For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Sep-03-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Harbour and Alexis Donoghoe for Walter Taylor (General Power of Attorney). Barbara Simon (Proposed Trustee) also present. Jonathan Adkinson (Beneficiary) also present.

After a full explanation from the Court, Mr. Adkinson stated that he understood and consented to waiver of accountings, waiver of bond and waiving of Court approval of Attorney's fees. Mr. Harbour stated that funds were being administered by Walter Taylor (Decedent's Nephew) and that expenses had been forwarded by Walter as well. The Court stated that the expenses were not properly before the Court, that it was simpler to allow the establishment of the Special Needs Trust and then the Trustee can make a determination as to those expenses. The Court granted the petition (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.

PETITION Petition By Agent Under Power Of Attorney For Order To Establish Special Needs Trust; And For Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Aug-18-2010 Continued To Aug-25-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
